title: agropyron sclerophyllum
intro: Agropyron sclerophyllum, also known as Sclerochloa dura or Dura grass, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Agropyron sclerophyllum include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
